experiment_title: 卤素间反应与颜色变化的观察

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="卤素间反应与颜色变化的观察" goal="比较KBr溶液和KI溶液与氯水、溴水反应后的颜色变化，并记录相应的化学反应方程式" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_3" type="test_tube" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="measuring_cylinder" type="measuring_cylinder" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="dropper" type="dropper" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="KBr_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="KI_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="chlorine_water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="bromine_water" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="KBr" volume="4 mL" tool="measuring_cylinder" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="Cl2" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_1" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_2" />
      
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_4" />
      
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="KI" volume="4 mL" tool="measuring_cylinder" id="step_5" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="Cl2" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_7" />
      
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_2" id="step_8" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_9" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_3" reagent="KI" volume="4 mL" tool="measuring_cylinder" id="step_10" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_3" reagent="Br2" volume="1 mL" tool="dropper" id="step_11" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_12" />
      
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_3" id="step_13" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_14" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>
